prestazioni: Engine: K24A2 (2.4L DOHC i-VTEC) with a custom-built 88mm forged crankshaft from Manley Performance, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs (12.5:1 compression) for a 2.5L stroker build. Paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) on a custom Precision Turbo manifold with Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and Tial Q 50mm blow-off valve. Fuel system upgraded with Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, and a Radium Engineering dual-port fuel rail with AN-6 feed lines.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.785 final drive ratio) with a PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset (1st: 2.666, 2nd: 1.904, 3rd: 1.523, 4th: 1.222, 5th: 1.000, 6th: 0.825) and a Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel. Axles upgraded to Driveshaft Shop 3.5" aluminum driveshaft and CV joints with 27 spline axles from The Driveshaft Shop.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 8kg/mm front/10kg/mm rear springs) with custom valving for the DC5 chassis. Sway bars upgraded to Eibach Pro-Street (24mm front, 22mm rear) and spherical bearing end links from Whiteline. Braking system features StopTech Big Brake Kit (355mm 2-piece rotors, 6-piston calipers front, 330mm 4-piston rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (DC5-specific, 3-piece overfenders with carbon fiber front bumper, rear diffuser, and GT wing) paired with a Seibon Carbon hood (1x1 weave, 30% weight reduction). Front splitter is a custom 3D-printed ABS unit with integrated canards from APR Performance, while the rear features a Voltex Type 3 rear wing (1,800mm span, 3D adjustable).

Exterior: Full respray in BASF Glasurit 90-Line 'Bayside Blue' with a 3-stage pearl flake and 2000-grit wet sand finish. OEM+ JDM conversion with Integra Type R (DC2) front lip, rear bumper, and side skirts (replica from J's Racing). Lighting upgraded to Morimoto XB LED headlights (projector retrofit with HID ballasts) and Depo Racing JDM-spec taillights with sequential turn signals.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E (Spoon Sports edition) front seats with Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses and a Bride Euro II rear seat delete (carbon fiber panel with custom Alcantara upholstery). Steering wheel is a NRG Innovations 350mm deep-dish (S2000 pattern) wrapped in Alcantara with a custom embroidered 'Type S' logo. Gauges are Defi Advance BF series (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband) mounted in a custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod.
